title: Traceability Metrics
description: Per-need-type traceability coverage metrics produced by the docs build (score_metamodel Sphinx extension). Consumed by traceability_gate to enforce coverage thresholds without re-parsing needs.json.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Bump when the shape changes incompatibly.

generated_by.description: Name of the producer that generated this file (e.g. 'sphinx_build').

metrics_by_type.description: Metrics keyed by need type (e.g. 'tool_req', 'comp_req'). Each key is one call-scope: the requirement type string passed via --requirement-types.

include_not_implemented.description: Whether requirements with implemented==NO were counted in the denominator.

include_external.description: Whether external (imported) requirements were included in the metrics.

total.description: Total number of requirements in scope.

with_code_link.description: Requirements that have a non-empty source_code_link.

with_test_link.description: Requirements that have a non-empty testlink.

fully_linked.description: Requirements that have both source_code_link and testlink.

missing_code_link_ids.description: Sorted IDs of requirements missing source_code_link.

missing_test_link_ids.description: Sorted IDs of requirements missing testlink.

not_fully_linked_ids.description: Sorted IDs of requirements missing either source_code_link or testlink.

total.description: Total testcase needs considered (after optional test_type filter).

filtered_test_types.description: The test_type values used to filter testcases. Empty means all types.

linked_to_requirements.description: Testcases that reference at least one requirement via partially_verifies or fully_verifies.

broken_references.description: Testcase references that point to unknown requirement IDs.

testcase.description: ID of the testcase containing the broken reference.

missing_need.description: Requirement ID referenced by the testcase that does not exist in needs.json.
